title: Direction
text: Direction Direction in which the parameter is passed. One of IN , OUT , or INOUT (default). Description An entity or occurrence parameter must be defined as INOUT . If the parameter is defined only as OUT , no data is copied into the data buffer. Applies To Signature Parameter Related Links Signatures A Uniface signature describes the remote interface of a component. The interface enables other components to address the component without knowing anything about the implementation. This allows components of different origin to communicate through their respective interfaces. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
